# Responsive Skill

## Auto-Load When

- building any page, layout, grid, form, or navigation surface

## Rules

- mobile-first layout decisions
- content must remain usable between major breakpoints
- tap targets must be practical on touch devices
- do not rely on hover-only interactions

## Checklist

- small-screen spacing holds up
- text does not overflow awkwardly
- grid collapses cleanly
- forms remain usable on narrow widths
- sticky or fixed UI does not cover content

## Best Practices

- test one compact, one medium, and one wide viewport
- prioritize content order over exact desktop symmetry
